def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta

    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    atr_multiplier = params['atr_multiplier']

    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window).average_true_range()
    rsi = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)

    upper_band = df['close'] + atr_multiplier * atr
    lower_band = df['close'] - atr_multiplier * atr

    signals = np.where((df['close'] > upper_band) & (rsi > 70), -1, np.where((df['close'] < lower_band) & (rsi < 30), 1, 0))

    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: XAG/USD exhibits momentum behavior when price breaks out of ATR-based bands and is confirmed by RSI extremes.
